generated_oml:
instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container for thermal isolation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for thermal regulation"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for even temperature distribution"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller processing sensor data and controlling actuators"
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor 1 in incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData1
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor 2 in incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData2
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempData
]

instance InternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1
]

instance InternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from internal and external sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData1, InternalTempData2, ExternalTempData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelCalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel2Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal simulation model for incubator heatbed dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel4Param : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal simulation model with higher fidelity for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelCalibrationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ModelCalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating thermal model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Mechanism for identifying sensor or hardware anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for predicting thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System state visualization for operator oversight"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of internal and external temperatures through sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of thermal dynamics for proactive control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration algorithms to update parameters based on operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms for identifying sensor or hardware anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of system state for operator oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature status for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal dynamics for proactive control"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters based on operational data"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detected in sensor or hardware"
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of system state for operators"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update CPS and environment models using sensor data for parameter estimation, with resulting data informing monitoring components that assess system safety and optimization. Violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to adjust the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of predicted versus actual thermal behavior, where the 4-parameter model's superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia was demonstrated. Calibration algorithms adjust parameters using sensor data to minimize discrepancies, and monitoring systems detect safety violations by comparing real-time data against model outputs to trigger corrective actions."
]
